summary.intent: Add a tabbed interface to the left session list panel, separating live sessions from past/historical sessions.
summary.outcome: Merged the standalone SessionHistory component into a tabbed SessionList component with 'Live' and 'Past' tabs, committed and pushed successfully.

repo: Session UI lives in crates/web/src/assets/js/page-browser.js and uses preact/htm-style JSX with tagged template literals
SessionList and SessionHistory were previously separate components; past sessions are those in the DB but not active in the pool
Dead sessions (connection lost without proper close) now appear in past sessions tab due to earlier fix that sets closed_at via action hook

code.finding: Line 677 closes the flex-col gap-2 div inside the live tab; ternary and outer div closings had to be added carefully after this point

workflow: Multiple read passes were needed before editing due to the complexity of inline JSX structure and nested div closings
Lint step (warnings only, no errors) was run before commit to verify structural correctness

friction: Required multiple re-reads of the same file to track nested JSX div structure before edits could be applied correctly
Closing the ternary and outer div after the tab content required a separate targeted edit pass
